meaning: vt.控告,向...请求,请愿vi.提出诉讼,提出请求
examples: They intend to sue for damages.
Mike and Sue are always rowing.
Sue is training to be a doctor.
In December Antonios fired his chief executive, who says he intends to sue for wrongful termination.
Sue Beeton, associate professor of tourism at La Trobe Business School, Australia agreed.
